title: Worker Result
description: Structured output from a worker agent after executing a ticket.

ticket.description: Ticket ID that was worked on (e.g. 'TICKET-0090').

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what was accomplished or why it failed.

commit_hash.description: Git commit hash if work was committed.

pr_url.description: Pull request URL if a PR was created.

files_changed.description: List of files created or modified.

new_gd_scripts.description: True if new .gd script files were created (triggers UID commit procedure).

blockers.description: Description of blocking issues if outcome is blocked or failed.
